title: soranthe phylicoides
intro: Soranthe phylicoides, also known as the "Australian Native Violet", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Soranthe phylicoides can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to limited research and potential interactions with medications.
